SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

Interface ClientPublicationI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClientPublicationPlugin
public interface ClientPublicationI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI
The interface ClientPublicationI declares the signatures of methods that a client publication plug-in must implement.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-02-04

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, MessageI message)
    asynchronously publish message on channel.
    void
    asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.
    boolean
    channelAuthorised(String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
    boolean
    channelExist(String channel)
    return true if channel exists, otherwise false.

    publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    asynchronously publish message on channel.
    void
    publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.

    Methods inherited from interface fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI

    finalise, getPluginURI, getPreferredExecutionServiceIndex, getPreferredExecutionServiceURI, initialise, installOn, isCallerRuns, isInitialised, setPluginURI, setPreferredExecutionServiceURI, uninstall

  • Method Details

    • channelExist

      boolean channelExist(String channel)
      return true if channel exists, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of a potential channel.
      Returns:
      true if channel exists, otherwise false.

    • channelAuthorised

      boolean channelAuthorised(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException
      return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of a potential channel.
      Returns:
      true if the use of channel is authorised for receptionPortURI, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.

    • publish

      void publish(String channel, MessageI message) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException
      asynchronously publish message on channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    message != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      message - message to be published on channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to publish on channel.

    • publish

      void publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException
      asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel on which message must be published.
      messages - list of messages to be published on channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to publish on channel.

    • asyncPublishAndNotify

      void asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, MessageI message)
      asynchronously publish message on channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    message != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.

      Exception notification

      UnknownClientException when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet. UnknownChannelException when channel does not exist. UnauthorisedClientException when the client is not authorised to publish on channel.

      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      message - message to be published on channel.

    • asyncPublishAndNotify

      void asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
      asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.

      Exception notification

      UnknownClientException when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet. UnknownChannelException when channel does not exist. UnauthorisedClientException when the client is not authorised to publish on channel.

      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel on which message must be published.
      messages - list of messages to be published on channel.
